ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "sl_no" TEXT /* Serial number of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Diploma, Certificate) */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of hours required to complete the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the course content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_course_type FOREIGN KEY ("course_type") REFERENCES course_types ("course_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "course_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course type */,
  "course_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the course type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course type */,
  "duration_type" TEXT /* Type of duration (e.g., months, years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's residential address */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student in the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was completed by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "class_time" TEXT /* Time of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the class is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Whether the student was present (true) or absent (false) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks regarding the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
